summary.para: This attribute should be used in properties of DTO/Details class types that have the or with .

The class of the property type will be generated.
This generation will be similar to AutoProperties, using the property related to TFrom as the source type.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.SmartSelector.AutoPropertiesAttributeBase
member.summary: Provides the common configuration for attributes that automatically select properties.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.SmartSelector.AutoPropertiesAttributeBase.Exclude
member.summary: An array of property names to exclude from automatic property handling. Property names are case-sensitive. Can be empty to include all properties.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.SmartSelector.AutoPropertiesAttributeBase.Flattening
member.summary: An array of property names to generate flattening for complex or nested properties. Property names are case-sensitive.

summary.para: This attribute is used with the to indicate that all public properties of the TFrom class should be included in the selection.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.SmartSelector.AutoPropertiesAttribute`1
member.summary: Specifies that a class should automatically implement properties based on the members of the specified type.
member.typeparam: The type whose members are used to generate properties for the attributed class.

summary.para:
This attribute is used to mark that one class is selectable from another, and the code generator must create the necessary functions.
It will generate a select expression, a From method for conversion, and extension methods for select.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.SmartSelector.MapFromAttribute
member.summary: Indicates that the decorated property should map its value from another property with the specified name.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.SmartSelector.MapFromAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MapFromAttribute class, specifying the source property name to map from.
member.param: The source property name or dot-separated property path. Cannot be null or empty.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.SmartSelector.MapFromAttribute.PropertyName
member.summary: Gets or sets the source property name or dot-separated property path to map from.
